meta.name: Aswin Pradeep C
meta.tagline: Software Engineer. I build backends, break things, and occasionally fix them.

now: Currently building software at Kireap. Contributing to devb.io — an open-source developer bio platform. Previously interned at Geojit Financial Services, where I worked on an LLM-based search system using RAG for financial data retrieval. Finished my B.Tech in CS at CUSAT, class of 2025.
about: I'm a backend engineer from Kerala. I care about systems that are simple to reason about, fast to iterate on, and don't fall apart under load. I organized Make-A-Ton, South India's largest hackathon — equal parts chaos and genuinely fun. Outside work: coffee, bad puns, and side projects I may or may not finish.

bullets: Building and maintaining core backend systems.
Developed an LLM-based search system with RAG architecture for enhanced financial data retrieval.
Automated manual processes with machine learning to improve operational efficiency.
Built RESTful APIs for the travel module with input validation and error handling.
Reduced response times significantly on high-traffic endpoints using Redis caching.
Built a prototype using OpenCV for automated coupon code extraction from delivery images.
Implemented ROI detection to filter irrelevant text and streamline water delivery operations.

education.institution: Cochin University of Science and Technology
education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.name: LinkRadr
projects.desc: Scalable URL shortener with custom links, OTP-based sign-in, and Docker + GitHub Actions CI/CD on AWS EC2.

projects.name: EduRider
projects.desc: Route management system for school buses — role-based APIs for drivers and students, deployed on AWS with Flutter frontend integration.

projects.name: SOE Project Hub
projects.desc: Academic project management system with role-based access, plagiarism checking, team management, document uploads, and support ticket system.

opensource.desc: Open-source developer bio platform. Contributor — building tools that help developers present themselves better.

events.title: Make-A-Ton
events.subtitle: Lead Organizer
events.description: Led the full organization of Make-A-Ton — South India's largest hackathon — with 200+ participants and a 30-member organizing team. Secured sponsorships from GitHub, Logitech, MLH, Orkes, and GeeksForGeeks.

events.title: Summer Startup Festival 2023
events.subtitle: First Prize — Project Expo
events.description: Won First Prize in the Project Expo competition at GEC Thrissur's Summer Startup Festival.
